parameters.jsCode:
function q(value) {
  return `'${String(value ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''")}'`;
}
function qJson(value) {
  return `'${JSON.stringify(value ?? {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}'::jsonb`;
}

if (!$json.ok) return [{ json: $json }];

const payload = $json.payload;
const query = `
with upsert_project as (
  insert into operation_projects (
    id,
    member_id,
    name,
    current_module,
    current_stage_key,
    project_json,
    updated_at
  ) values (
    ${q($json.project_id)}::uuid,
    ${q($json.member_id)}::uuid,
    coalesce(nullif(${q(payload.project?.name)}, ''), 'Projeto sem nome'),
    ${q(payload.module?.id || 'module-1')},
    ${q($json.stage_key)},
    ${qJson(payload.project)},
    now()
  )
  on conflict (id) do update set
    name = excluded.name,
    current_module = excluded.current_module,
    current_stage_key = excluded.current_stage_key,
    project_json = excluded.project_json,
    updated_at = now()
  returning *
), recent_runs as (
  select coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
    'agent_id', agent_id,
    'project_section', project_section,
    'status', status,
    'transfer_block', transfer_block_json,
    'created_at', created_at
  ) order by created_at), '[]'::jsonb) as history_json
  from operation_agent_runs
  where project_id = ${q($json.project_id)}::uuid
)
select
  ${qJson(payload)} as payload_json,
  ${q($json.agent_id)} as agent_id,
  ${q($json.stage_key)} as stage_key,
  row_to_json(upsert_project.*)::jsonb as project_row_json,
  recent_runs.history_json
from upsert_project, recent_runs;
`;

return [{ json: { query } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, answer: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.answer, agent_id: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.agent_id, status: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.status, project_section: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.project_section, transfer_block: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.transfer_block, next_recommended_agent: $('Map Save SQL').item.json.next_recommended_agent } }}
